summary: The document pertains to a recent update from the European Union regulator concerning the adjustment of Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds. The revised limit is now set at €5,000 and is to be implemented immediately. It is incumbent upon the compliance team to align internal policies with this change and inform the finance department to revise customer verification processes accordingly.

tasks.description: Align internal policies with the revised Anti-Money Laundering reporting thresholds set by the European Union regulator
